detailed model output for Neptune's 1-bar isobaric surface. models are described in Mankovich et al. 2026, PSJ.
this model assumes the Voyager wind profile from Tollefson et al. (2018, Icarus 311).
mu=sin(phi), phi [radians], and lat_deg [degress] refer to planetocentric latitude; lat_pg_deg gives planetographic latitude in degrees.
